en: I help you because I like you.
I study hard because I want to pass the exam.
We have to go home since we have no idea where to go next.
ko: 다음에 어디 갈지 모르니까 집에 가야 해.

en: You need to hurry up since it's very late now.
I can't run fast as I'm too fat.
I love you so I will do everything to make you happy.
ko: 사랑하니까 널 행복하게 만들기 위해 뭐든 할 거야.

en: I didn't eat anything so I'm very hungry now.
ko: 아무것도 안 먹어서 지금 배가 너무 고파.

en: I did it because of you.
He didn't work hard. As a result, he was fired.
ko: 그는 열심히 일하지 않았다. 결과적으로 해고당했다.

en: I was busy this evening. Therefore, I couldn't come to your party.
ko: 오늘 저녁 바빴어. 그래서 파티에 못 갔어.
